name: conduit
description: Goal-driven software engineering system with a portable goal specification

scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @conduit/cgs build && pnpm --filter @conduit/shared build && pnpm --filter @conduit/tools build && pnpm --filter @conduit/model-providers build && pnpm --filter @conduit/runtime build
scripts.verify: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -r typecheck && tsc -p tsconfig.tests.json && node scripts/run-tests.mjs && pnpm --filter @conduit/desktop build
